name: Pirate Staff
description:
Carved of driftwood stained white with the salt of the sea, a pirate staff has jewels and gold pieces embedded in the wood. A skull and crossbones sit on top. When used as a weapon, the staff is a +2 striking fearsome staff. While wielding the staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks to .

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip ,
  • 1st
  • 2nd , ,
  • 3rd ,

  • 5th ,

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.
